    **Portugal secured a spot in the Round of 16 after a dramatic comeback win, with Cristiano Ronaldo scoring a crucial goal.**
    ## Context / Background
    The match between Portugal and Croatia was highly anticipated, with both teams seeking to advance in the World Cup. Croatia had a strong start, but Portugal's determination and skill ultimately led to their victory.
    ## Tactical Key Points / Stats Table
    | Team | Goals | Possession |
    | --- | --- | --- |
    | Portugal | 2 | 55% |
    | Croatia | 1 | 45% |
    Portugal's ability to maintain possession and create scoring opportunities was key to their success.
    > The use of VAR was a significant factor in the match, with a late goal by Croatia being denied due to a foul.
    ## What's Next?
    Portugal will face their next opponent in the Round of 16, while Croatia will look to regroup and prepare for their future matches.
